horoscope: Today's Venus-Jupiter alignment is strong for warmth and a feeling of abundance, dear Aries, particularly related to your family, home comforts, or personal life. There can be an opportunity to bring more love, beauty, or harmony to a relationship or your domestic world. You might receive a gift, or give yourself one, that benefits the family or home. It’s a time for emphasizing cooperation, trust, and faith. You're focusing on the good things in your life, and can be feeling quite generous both materially and emotionally. It's a good time to clear space around the home, expand contact, strengthen ties, and find peace with the past. Taking a trip down memory lane can be satisfying now. Later today, it's important to watch for self-criticism that ends up limiting your view of what you can accomplish. Tensions, and perhaps worries or insecurities, can prompt a gruff approach toward others. If you can think up a better way to say something, choose it! Even if you don't mean to be critical, others could read what you say in a negative light now.

Sharing ideas can be in pleasant focus today, dear Taurus, with a Venus-Jupiter alignment. You can enjoy opportunities to expand your knowledge, connections, or mental interests. Good news arrives, and conversations can be fun or heartwarming. You could feel inspired to pursue a line of study or make contact. New or improved means of transportation and communication can be in the spotlight. Success comes right now through word of mouth or bright ideas. Your good cheer and optimism can help strengthen close relationships. Promotion or publicity can be particularly favorable or prosperous. Later today, however, consider that your insecurities, fears, or guilt could affect your approach to presenting your ideas or asking for what you want. Adjust your approach by seeking to learn from problem areas so that you can go forward feeling stronger and more confident.

Venus and Jupiter join forces in your solar second house today, dear Gemini, and you enjoy a special appreciation for recent blessings. As well, people seem to appreciate your presence and talents. There can be a pleasant feeling of abundance or a stronger drive to enjoy certain freedoms or the fruit of your labor. This planetary combination rewards warmth and good cheer. You could enjoy a gift or the discovery of a resource that benefits you today. Some overview thinking regarding long-term goals and short-term issues in your life can be very beneficial now. Money is not just about security, but also about freedom to you these days, and today’s energies seem to help you attract what you want and need. Later today, problems you thought were behind you can re-emerge, and you may need to address criticism or negativity. Aim to be flexible and resilient so that the little problems that are likely to crop up now don't spoil your mood. Keep in mind that many times, managing small problems leads to useful new findings.

Today's strong for sharing your feelings, happiness, art, talents, and joy, dear Cancer, as Venus in your sign highlights your lovable qualities and aligns with Jupiter, the planet of expansion. You are easy to be around and may be feeling especially confident about who you are and how you deal with life, in general. This transit expands your feelings. If you're unsatisfied, it's possible that this feels overwhelming. In such cases, reaching out to others for support or focusing on appreciating what you currently have may be important. You would do well to put a past grudge behind you, as this is a good time to do so. You could find yourself itching to do something new or to express yourself in different ways. Later today, criticism or negativity may prompt a big desire to improve and change things for the better. There can be a multitude of little problems, misunderstandings, and blocks. Be a little more attentive about what you say, and perhaps most importantly, don't rush communications.

With Venus and Jupiter aligning in your solar twelfth house today, dear Leo, you might free yourself from a burden or unhealthy attachment. Forgiveness and understanding can help you move on and embrace your future. There could be warm feelings about a private issue or a genuine desire to help others. Something could surface that brings joy to your life. A personal matter can also stir happy feelings today. Notable conversations, news, or even a chance meeting or experience, can help you gain greater insight into something that's frustrated you. Synchronicity may be in play, such as an unusual coincidence that brings a little joy into your life. However, later today, communication can be tricky, largely due to uncertainty and possibly insecurities. Missed connections, delays, and minor mishaps may interrupt things, but they can also lead to interesting detours.

Today's Venus-Jupiter alignment encourages long-term vision and expanding feelings and pleasures, dear Virgo. Of course, this does mean you should watch for overestimating things. You are likely to feel a little bolder about expressing your likes and loves or pursuing your heart’s desire. This transit prompts a fun, happy outlook. Helping or sharing ideas can be in pleasant focus. You might turn to others or new ideas for inspiration, and you're likely to find it. This is a time to detox from pressured situations and goals, and to make more time for sharing, connecting, and community. You're feeding your soul and reminding yourself that happiness counts! Later today, however, we head to a Mercury-Saturn square, making it difficult to get a point across. Avoid getting worked up over the little details, but do work on problem areas. Negativity can affect your decisions, but while this can be irritating, you might end up making constructive changes as a result.

Today's Venus-Jupiter alignment is happy energy, dear Libra, and you can be more confident in your path or happier about where you’re heading. Freeing yourself from problems that have weighed you down can be liberating this week. Making plans and setting goals is exciting now. Business connections can be helpful, or you especially enjoy setting goals for yourself. People may be enjoying and appreciating what you do. Romantic or friendly connections are particularly likely to form through public exposure or business affairs these days. Later today, a Mercury-Saturn square comes into play, and it can indicate a boss or partner being critical, negative, unavailable, or unresponsive. People may be holding on too tightly to their ways of thinking or personal traditions. You can't control these things, but you can control your reactions. Take an honest look at what needs improving and answer to yourself.

Fortunately, Venus and Jupiter join forces today, dear Scorpio, promoting good feelings and optimism. You are thinking and feeling in broad terms right now, and your motivation to make improvements or bring more meaning to your life strengthens with the day's events and sensations. You are more adventurous with your feelings and bolder in your affections now, and sharing your ideas with others might even lead to significant opportunities, whether personally or professionally. You gravitate to activities that connect you with empowering ideas and experiences, as well as people who stir hope and optimism in you. Non-routine activities are most appealing and beneficial now. Later today, a Mercury-Saturn influence comes into play, and responsibilities surface, particularly work-related ones, and the tendency is to see the flaws, blocks, and delays, and not the opportunities. The best way to manage this is to be easy on yourself and humble with others.

You may get a chance to strengthen a connection today, dear Sagittarius, as Venus and Jupiter align. It can feel easier to open up about a passion or about a matter that you’ve been keeping under wraps. It’s a time to accept others’ help, share responsibilities, and combine resources or talents to advance your goals. It's also a strong influence for considering your deeper needs, as others are responsive, and some of the usual barriers and boundaries dissolve. New insights about yourself or someone special in your life can be motivating and heartwarming. While plans may not be on schedule, hearts are in the right place. Later today, however, criticism may be stirring the pot, little problems seem to threaten to take control of your life, and you'll want to turn things around so that you're the one taking care of problems. The interpretation of intention or meaning can be off in our communications temporarily.

Today's Venus-Jupiter alignment promotes cooperation, dear Capricorn. There can be distinct opportunities to win others over or enhance a relationship. There can be mutual benefits through others, whether it's counseling, business, or romance. This could be a time to attract a pleasant or helpful person into your life, or you might pair up with someone to put a problem behind you. Expressing love, pleasure, warmth, and affection comes more naturally than usual, and you're likely to find others are receptive and pleased with you now. Later today, there's more of an inclination to criticism or a feeling of being bogged down and unduly restricted. Pressures from family or related to domestic matters can weigh heavily, particularly as they relate to your personal freedoms or attention to a partnership.

Today's Venus-Jupiter alignment may motivate you to do meaningful work or make your current routines more meaningful, dear Aquarius. Be on the lookout for opportunities to improve or enjoy your daily life and health routines. There can be compliments or rewards for your skills and efforts. Gaining cooperation to complete chores or maintenance can be easy today, and good humor can lead to healing and a more confident attitude toward improving health. Sparks of attraction or love might even occur while pursuing your daily routines or health goals. Being busy can feel great today. However, as the day advances, a Mercury-Saturn influence comes into play, and there can be an obstacle standing in your way before you can move forward with confidence. Watch for a tendency to focus on what you don't or can't have. Delays involving commuting or communications can be prominent now. Keep in mind, however, that delays very often lead to clever workarounds and useful learning experiences.

There can be excellent opportunities for self-expression through your contact with others today, dear Pisces, as Venus and Jupiter align in your sector of joy. You could be expanding your horizons through your pleasures and pastimes. Love can be magical, and your powers of attraction are strong. Your confidence increases, and you could feel exceptionally generous, whether with your heart, time, happiness, or money. As the day progresses, however, there may be a misunderstanding, a communication block, or a mental disconnect that leaves you feeling exasperated. However, your creative workaround can ultimately boost your confidence, and you can learn something useful in the process.
